title: Race To The Moon - RELAUNCHED
description: The original Race to the Moon pack - rebuilt, optimized and modernized with fixes, better than ever performance and backported modern features!
body:
# 🪐 Race to the Moon – Relaunched  
> **Relive the original Race to the Moon** — restored, modernized, and rebalanced for a new generation of spacefarers.  
> Build, explore, and race your way beyond the stars.  

---

## 🚀 About  
**Race to the Moon – Relaunched** is a heartfelt revival of the legendary IballisticSquid, Stampy, and Yogscast era.  

You’ll begin on **Earth**, mining and crafting your way through classic **1.7.10 tech**.  
Automate, industrialize, and innovate as you race your friends to be the first to set foot on the **Moon**.  

And once you’ve made it there, the adventure continues — out to **Mars and beyond**.  

This pack captures the heart of the original *Race to the Moon* while updating it with **modern performance**, **cleaner visuals**, and **backported features** that make it feel alive again.  

---

## ✨ What Makes It Special  

### 🌕 The True Classic Restored  
Every original mod from the iconic YouTube series is here:  
> Galacticraft • BuildCraft • IndustrialCraft² • Thermal Expansion • Applied Energistics • Tinkers’ Construct • and many more... 

No replacements. No compromises. Just the authentic tech, exploration, and creativity that made the series unforgettable.  

---

### ⚡ Modern Stability and Performance  
Under the hood, the pack runs smoother than ever.  

Optimizations from **Angelica** (a Sodium-based renderer), **ArchaicFix** (Phosphor Backport), **Hodgepodge**, and **BugTorch** deliver:  
- Massive FPS improvements  
- Faster chunk loading  
- Crash-free performance  

All without changing the look or feel of the game.  

---

### 🔧 Rebalanced, Refined, and Fair  
Old exploits, infinite loops, and dupe bugs have been patched to keep the game **competitive and fun**.  
You’ll still find creative ways to outsmart your friends — just not by breaking the game.  

---

### 🧱 Modern Minecraft, Classic Heart  
With **Et Futurum Requiem**, this pack backports newer Minecraft features into 1.7.10:  
- Updated world generation and mechanics  
- Modern blocks, items, and mobs  
- Visual polish and sound improvements  

> These additions make the world feel alive — bridging classic modded Minecraft with the comfort and smoothness of newer versions.  

---

## 🔩 Key Features  

| Category | Highlights |
|-----------|-------------|
| 🪓 **Industrial Tech** | Build vast factories using IC2, Thermal Expansion, Ender IO, and Big Reactors |
| 🚀 **Space Exploration** | Launch rockets, build lunar bases, and colonize Mars with Galacticraft |
| 🌲 **Beautiful Worlds** | Explore diverse landscapes from Biomes O’ Plenty, Mystcraft, and Natura |
| 🏗️ **Automation** | Use BuildCraft quarries, MFR machines, and AE2 networks to automate everything |
| 🧰 **Improved Tools & Storage** | Tinkers’ Construct, Storage Drawers, Iron Chests, and AE2 integration |
| 🧠 **Quality of Life** | NEI, Wawla, MouseTweaks, Entity Culling, and performance libraries |

---

## 🌍 World Generation Options  
The pack now includes support for two unique world-gen styles:

- **Biomes O’ Plenty** – colorful, diverse, classic modded biomes  
- **RTG (Realistic Terrain Generation)** – smoother, more natural terrain using BoP biomes

> Pick your world type when creating a new world.

---

## 🛰️ Multiplayer Ready  
Whether you’re forming teams or going solo, **Race to the Moon – Relaunched** is built for multiplayer.  
All mods are **server-compatible** and **tuned for competitive balance**, so you can recreate the iconic challenge or start your own.  

> ✨ Works seamlessly with E4MC for fast, no-setup multiplayer.  

---

## ⚙️ Modpack Overview  
```yaml
Minecraft Version: 1.7.10
Forge Build: Listed in included manifest
Recommended RAM: 3–8 GB (client) / 4–12 GB (server)
Supports: Singleplayer & Multiplayer (multiplayer encouraged)
```

---

## 🧩 Java 17+ — Recommended (OPTIONAL)
Using Java 17 or newer is recommended for best performance and compatibility with modern hardware.

### Setup
1. Install Java 17 or Java 21 if it is not already installed on your computer (**[Eclipse Adoptium recommended](https://adoptium.net/)**).
2. Enable lwjgl3ify in the mod list.
3. Run the pack.
4. Select your Java 17+ executable in the relauncher.
   - **Windows example**: C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium\\jre-21\\bin\\javaw.exe
   - **macOS example**: /Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/temurin-21.jdk/Contents/Home/bin/java
   - **Linux example:** /usr/lib/jvm/temurin-21-jre/bin/java
5. CLICK "LAUNCH".

---

## 💬 Credits  
All included mods belong to their original authors.  
This modpack simply brings them together again — cleaned up, fixed, and optimized — to celebrate the **golden age of modded Minecraft** and the legacy of **IballisticSquid, Stampy, and the Yogscast’s unforgettable space adventures**.  

> **Race to the Moon – Relaunched** is both a nostalgia trip and a fresh experience — the same story, told through a smoother lens.  

---

A huge thanks to the incredible mod creators whose work made this project possible:
